title: Artifacts (HTML) as first-class content (component + route + authoring skill)
description: Self-contained HTML artifacts become a first-class content type: NN_-prefixed .html files render embedded in the docs content area (sidebar + TOC chrome intact) with a same-name .json metadata sidecar, a reserved /artifacts/<path> route opens the full-page view, and a new in-repo authoring skill — converged from four captured design skills (artifact-design, dataviz, design-sync, frontend-design) — teaches how to build, publish, and maintain artifacts, brand systems, and design systems inside the docs and the tracker.
author: sidhantha
